allow: Bash(# Check for existing talosconfig or kubeconfig files ls -la ~/.kube/config ; ls -la ~/talosconfig ; ls -la ~/.talosconfig ; find /c/Users/Shaun -maxdepth 2 -name ""talosconfig"" -o -name "".talosconfig"")
Bash(# Ping .65 and scan ports ping -n 1 -w 2000 192.168.1.65)

Bash(# Decode and inspect the certs from the talosconfig cd /c/Users/Shaun/kaizen-core # Extract the CA cert grep ""ca:"" talosconfig -A1 | tail -1 | tr -d '' '' | base64 -d | openssl x509 -noout -text 2>&1)
Bash(# Recheck the known IPMI addresses plus .201 from browser tab for ip in 192.168.1.65 192.168.1.245 192.168.1.201; do echo -n ""$ip ping: "" ping -n 1 -w 1500 $ip)
Bash(# Also re-ping .201 with longer timeout and check .65 from a different angle ping -n 2 -w 3000 192.168.1.201)
